'''鈭歭-v-ch-w''' ('''kalavchewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calcificate|calcificate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calcificate|calcificate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-v-ch-w
|-
! Lemma
| kalavchewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavchewoko|thilavchewoko]] || [[word:jilavchewoko|jilavchewoko]] || [[word:shilavchewoko|shilavchewoko]] || [[word:kilavchewoko|kilavchewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulavchewoko|thuthulavchewoko]] || [[word:jujulavchewoko|jujulavchewoko]] || [[word:shushulavchewoko|shushulavchewoko]] || [[word:kukulavchewoko|kukulavchewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulavchewoko|thulavchewoko]] || [[word:julavchewoko|julavchewoko]] || [[word:shulavchewoko|shulavchewoko]] || [[word:kulavchewoko|kulavchewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulavchewoko|thulavchewoko]] || [[word:julavchewoko|julavchewoko]] || [[word:shulavchewoko|shulavchewoko]] || [[word:kulavchewoko|kulavchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelavchewoko|thelavchewoko]] || [[word:jelavchewoko|jelavchewoko]] || [[word:shelavchewoko|shelavchewoko]] || [[word:kelavchewoko|kelavchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholavchewoko|thotholavchewoko]] || [[word:jojolavchewoko|jojolavchewoko]] || [[word:shosholavchewoko|shosholavchewoko]] || [[word:kokolavchewoko|kokolavchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholavchewoko|tholavchewoko]] || [[word:jolavchewoko|jolavchewoko]] || [[word:sholavchewoko|sholavchewoko]] || [[word:kolavchewoko|kolavchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholavchewoko|tholavchewoko]] || [[word:jolavchewoko|jolavchewoko]] || [[word:sholavchewoko|sholavchewoko]] || [[word:kolavchewoko|kolavchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lavchewoko|th忙lavchewoko]] || [[word:j忙lavchewoko|j忙lavchewoko]] || [[word:sh忙lavchewoko|sh忙lavchewoko]] || [[word:k忙lavchewoko|k忙lavchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalavchewoko|thathalavchewoko]] || [[word:jajalavchewoko|jajalavchewoko]] || [[word:shashalavchewoko|shashalavchewoko]] || [[word:kakalavchewoko|kakalavchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalavchewoko|thalavchewoko]] || [[word:jalavchewoko|jalavchewoko]] || [[word:shalavchewoko|shalavchewoko]] || [[word:kalavchewoko|kalavchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalavchewoko|thalavchewoko]] || [[word:jalavchewoko|jalavchewoko]] || [[word:shalavchewoko|shalavchewoko]] || [[word:kalavchewoko|kalavchewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
